name: Dazzler
ability: Ongoing: If you have 4 cards at each location, +6 Power.

name: Galactus
ability: On Reveal: If this is your only card here, destroy all other locations.

name: Ghost
ability: Ongoing: Your cards are always revealed last. (Their On Reveal abilities happen last.)

name: Kang
ability: On Reveal: Look at what your opponent did, then restart the turn. (without Kang)

name: Master Mold
ability: On Reveal: Add 2 Sentinel to your opponent’s hand.

name: Sauron
ability: On Reveal: Remove the abilities from all Ongoing cards in your hand and deck.

name: Shadow King
ability: On Reveal: Set all cards here to their original base Power.

name: Shanna
ability: On Reveal: Add a random 1-Cost card to each location

name: Stature
ability: Costs 1 if your opponent discarded a card from their hand this game.

name: Thanos
ability: At the start of the game, shuffle the six Infinity Stones into your deck.
